# Embedded module manifest for hermes-node.
# Lines starting with # are comments.
# @bootstrap modules are NOT wrapped in CJS; they are executed as-is.
# All other modules are wrapped in the standard Node CJS wrapper.
#
# Generated by tracing loader.js during test suite execution.
# Order does not matter; the build system resolves each ID to a source file.

# Bootstrap modules (non-CJS, executed directly)
@bootstrap primordials
@bootstrap loader
@bootstrap setup-stdio

# Internal modules (CJS-wrapped)
assert
async_hooks
buffer
cluster
console
diagnostics_channel
dns
events
fs
fs/promises
internal/abort_controller
internal/assert
internal/assert/assertion_error
internal/assert/calltracker
internal/assert/myers_diff
internal/assert/utils
internal/async_context_frame
internal/async_hooks
internal/blob
internal/bootstrap/realm
internal/buffer
internal/cli_table
internal/console/constructor
internal/console/global
internal/constants
internal/dns/callback_resolver
internal/dns/promises
internal/dns/utils
internal/errors
internal/errors/error_source
internal/event_target
internal/events/abort_listener
internal/fixed_queue
internal/fs/cp/cp
internal/fs/cp/cp-sync
internal/fs/dir
internal/fs/promises
internal/fs/read/context
internal/fs/recursive_watch
internal/fs/utils
internal/fs/watchers
internal/linkedlist
internal/net
internal/options
internal/perf/observe
internal/priority_queue
internal/process/permission
internal/process/promises

internal/streams/utils

internal/timers
internal/url
internal/util

# child_process support

tty

internal/fs/streams
internal/process/signal

# readline support
readline
readline/promises
internal/readline/callbacks
internal/readline/emitKeypressEvents

internal/readline/utils
internal/repl/history

# module (public builtin)
module
internal/source_map/source_map
internal/source_map/source_map_cache_map

# vm module support
vm
internal/vm

# CJS module resolution support
internal/modules/cjs/loader
internal/modules/helpers
internal/modules/package_json_reader
internal/modules/customization_hooks
internal/modules/typescript
internal/modules/run_main

# ESM resolver (needed by CJS loader for "exports" field resolution)
internal/modules/esm/formats
internal/modules/esm/utils
internal/modules/esm/resolve

internal/modules/esm/get_format
